name: Milk & Dairy
description: Glass-bottled A2 desi cow milk, traditional hand-churned bilona ghee, and tangy fresh buttermilk — all from our indigenous Gir, Sahiwal, Tharparkar, Bachaur and Punganur cows.
imageAlt: Brass vessel of A2 ghee beside a glass milk bottle on a wooden tabletop

name: Traditional Snacks
description: Thekua, nimki and mathri — slow-rolled, slow-fried, made with our own ghee. Sourced from women's collectives in nearby Bihar villages; proceeds support both the gaushala and rural livelihoods.
imageAlt: Plate of golden thekua, crisp nimki and flaky mathri on a steel thali
